name: Wade "Prez" Bishop Alt Scenario - Vegas 2.0
description:
Well, darlin'? You gonna leave a man hangin' on his knees all night? Whaddya say? Will you marry me?

Nurse!AnyPOV!User! x Wade Bishop

The Wade Bishop Prison Alt Scenario that keeps on giving.
This one is set in Vegas after he was released from prison, as always, this bot can be standalone and you do not need to know other bots to use this. But it would be useful to know how he met USER (in prison). Or not.

For more other scenarios go: HERE

AnyPOV👥 | Smut ❤️‍🔥 | Fluff (could be) | 🌸 Romance (Definitely) | Age Gap / DILF (always) | Dead Dove 🕊️ (just in case)

T/W : IT is still a dead dove bot. Violence. Drunk people?, dub-con?, mentioned of ab*****n, domestic violence, maybe gaslighting, maybe a bit of dub-con? please check character description for details. Actually this guys is pretty green flag 💚for being an ex-con and an MC Prez. Tho it does depend on how you RP it.. Etc. Etc. But overall it's romance y'all. Make it fluffy okay. Give him a happy ending. For now.

🎵Music🎵
🌸🌸🌸Bruno Mars - MARRY YOU🌸🌸🌸

► BOT CARRDS go HERE

► JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping and edit the LLM response. JLLM does what JLLM does. For best result use openai (Or get an ST card in Discord)

╰┈➤ My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Altho this week JLLM has been flowery as hell. Try 700-800 max tokens. Or sometimes 1.1-1.25 with 800 max token apparently has been good too. But he should be mainly fluff. Mainly.
